questionHtml:
16 g of bromine react with 5.2 g of metal, M, to form MBr2. What is the relative atomic mass of the metal M? (Ar : Br = 80)

 

A.   13

B.   26

C.   52

D.   104

meta.title: 16 g of bromine react with 5.2 g of metal, M, to form MBr2. What is the relative atomic mass of the metal M? (Ar : Br = 80) A. 13 B. 26 C. 52 D. 104
